name: Idle / Clicker Game Starter
description: Incremental clicker game with prestige reset mechanic and permanent progression. Features large click target with bounce feedback, currency display with intelligent number formatting (K, M, B, T). Auto-clicker generators producing passive income per second with exponentially scaling upgrade costs. Click power upgrades affecting single-click damage. Comprehensive achievement system with milestone rewards. Prestige mechanic allowing strategic restart for permanent multipliers. Offline earnings calculation. Statistics tracking (lifetime clicks, total earned, playtime). Auto-save every 30 seconds using ConfigFile.

projectStructure.project.godot: Godot 4.x with input mappings: click, select_upgrade, prestige, pause, stats

scenes/.main_game.tscn: Node2D with background Sprite2D, click_target child scene, UI layer (CanvasLayer), effects layer (CanvasLayer), auto-save timer (Timer node, 30 sec interval)
scenes/.click_target.tscn: TextureButton or Area2D with AnimatedSprite2D, scale_animation on click (0.9x → 1.0x over 0.1 sec), particle burst effect (10-15 particles), play click sound, emit click_released signal

ui/.currency_display.tscn: CanvasLayer with large Label showing formatted currency (e.g., '1.23B'), updates every frame, shows delta on click (+X floating text)
ui/.upgrade_panel.tscn: CanvasLayer with VScrollContainer containing upgrade_item children, title 'Upgrades', scrollable list of all available upgrades
ui/.upgrade_item.tscn: HBoxContainer with upgrade icon (Sprite2D), name Label, cost Label (formatted), current_level Label, Button to purchase, disabled state when insufficient currency, highlights on hover, shows tooltip on hover with description
ui/.achievement_panel.tscn: CanvasLayer with Grid of achievement_badge items, locked/unlocked visual states, name label, progress percentage (e.g., '75%' toward next milestone), click to view details
ui/.prestige_screen.tscn: CanvasLayer overlay with prestige explanation text, current prestige_currency display, prestige_multiplier stat display (e.g., 'x2.5'), confirm button with warning, prestige calculator showing new stats post-reset
ui/.stats_screen.tscn: CanvasLayer with statistics: total_clicks (integer), total_earned (formatted), lifetime_clicks_formatted, playtime (HH:MM:SS formatted), prestige_count, highest_multiplier, session_earnings
ui/.notification_popup.tscn: Node2D popup with animated slide-in (0.3 sec), text label (e.g., 'Achievement Unlocked: First Million!'), auto-dismiss after 3 seconds with slide-out animation, positioned bottom-center

preBuiltMechanics: Click system: Area2D click target detects input_event, emits click signal, currency_manager adds click_damage to currency, plays particle effect and sound, scale animation feedback
Currency management: uses float for large number storage (supports up to 1e15+), formatted display converts to string with K/M/B/T suffixes (1000=1K, 1000000=1M, etc.), updates display every frame
Click power: base_click_damage = 1, upgradeable via click_power upgrades, each upgrade multiplies damage by 1.15 (15% increase per level), cost = base_cost * (1.15^level), costs scale exponentially

Generator system: passive generators (auto-clickers) produce income_per_second, updates currency every frame using delta_time (currency += generator_output * delta), implements multiple generator tiers (worker=1/sec, manager=10/sec, robot=100/sec)

Generator upgrades: each generator type has independent level, cost = base_cost * (1.15^level) with soft scaling cap at level 100+, income = base_income * (1.1^level), purchased generators stack their output
Global multiplier: applies to all income (click + passive), increases via prestige upgrades, soft cap at 10x multiplier

Achievement system: dict of achievements with milestone conditions (clicks_100, earnings_1M, generators_10, prestige_1), tracks progress_value, reward_multiplier associated with each, achievements_earned array stores unlocked achievement IDs, displays notification_popup on unlock

Prestige system: prestige_currency = sqrt(total_earnings / 1e6) (gain 1 prestige point per 1M earned), prestige resets: currency → 0, generators → 0, click_power → 0, but permanent_multiplier += (1 + prestige_currency * 0.1), achievements persist, lifetime_stats accumulate
Prestige multiplier: each prestige point grants +10% permanent multiplier (1 prestige = 1.1x, 10 prestige = 2.59x, 100 prestige = 13.8x), applies globally to all income

Offline earnings: on app resume, calculates time_elapsed = OS.get_unix_time() - last_save_timestamp, offline_earnings = total_generators_output * time_elapsed * global_multiplier, adds to currency (capped at 1 hour offline to prevent abuse)

Statistics: tracks total_clicks (accumulates lifetime, persists across prestiges), total_earned (float sum of all currency ever earned), session_start_time recorded at game launch, playtime = current_time - session_start_time, lifetime_clicks_formatted stores string for display

Autoload currency_manager: persistent singleton autoload that handles currency value (float), click_power (float), all generator states (array of generator levels), prestige_currency (int), permanent_multiplier (float)

Save system: ConfigFile stores all state at save_path='user://clicker_save.cfg', saves: currency, click_power, generators (array), prestige_currency, permanent_multiplier, achievements_unlocked, last_save_timestamp (Unix time), auto-saves every 30 sec via Timer
Number formatting: converts float to string with suffix: if value >= 1e12 return format('%.2f T', value/1e12), elif >= 1e9 return format('%.2f B', ...) etc., handles decimal precision per magnitude
customizationPoints: Prestige tiers: implement multiple prestige trees with different permanent bonus types (damage multiplier, generator efficiency, click speed, etc.), allow player to allocate prestige points across trees
Ascension mechanics: add ascension levels that grant passive bonuses per level, unique visual effects at high ascension counts, prestige-gated ascension tiers
Event system: implement limited-time events with special generators (seasonal, holiday-themed), event currency and special event upgrades
Transcendence mechanic: add late-game mechanic above prestige that grants exponential boost (10x multiplier per transcendence), costs prestige to unlock
Shadow upgrades: implement hidden/mysterious upgrades that unlock at specific conditions (1 billion clicks, 100 prestige), provide massive multipliers
Automation improvements: add auto-prestige system that triggers when multiplier reaches threshold, auto-upgrade feature (auto-purchase best value upgrades)
UI enhancements: implement theme selector (dark/light), add animations on currency number updates, create interactive upgrade tree visualization showing dependencies
Milestone system: implement tier-based milestones (bronze/silver/gold/platinum/diamond) based on total_earned, grant badges with increasing multipliers (gold = 5x, diamond = 50x)
Mini-games: add optional mini-games playable for bonus currency multiplier boost for limited time (e.g., click speed test for 1 hour 1.5x multiplier)
Leaderboard: implement online leaderboard tracking highest prestige_currency, total_clicks, prestige_multiplier, daily/weekly/all-time rankings
examplePrompts: Create a click system that detects clicks on an Area2D, adds base_click_damage (1) to currency as a float, applies particle burst effect and sound, with scale animation feedback (0.9x then back to 1.0x in 0.1 seconds)

Implement an auto-clicker generator system with multiple tiers (worker=1 currency/sec, manager=10/sec, robot=100/sec), each with exponential cost scaling (base_cost * 1.15^level), and all generators sum their output to total_income_per_sec

Design an achievement system tracking milestones (100 clicks, 1M currency earned, 10 generators owned, 1 prestige level), emitting notification_popup on unlock and granting permanent_multiplier bonus rewards (e.g., +5% multiplier per achievement)

Create a prestige mechanic where prestige_currency = sqrt(total_earnings / 1e6), allows player to reset for permanent_multiplier += (1 + prestige * 0.1), persists achievements and lifetime stats across resets, displays prestige_multiplier effect (1 prestige = 1.1x, 10 prestige = 2.59x)

Implement offline earnings calculation using OS.get_unix_time() that adds (total_generators_output * seconds_elapsed * global_multiplier) to currency on resume, capped at 1 hour offline to prevent abuse, auto-save ConfigFile every 30 seconds with currency/prestige/stats
